tasks.name: Create dashboard types file with DashboardData interface
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interfaces for all 7 widget data structures and aggregate DashboardData type

dependencies: Type inference from mock data specifications
constraints: Types must match mock data structure in feature.md
Use semantic naming (RecentActivity, QuickStats, etc.)
Export all individual types and aggregate DashboardData

tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts exists with 7 widget interfaces and DashboardData aggregate type
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with exported DashboardData type containing all 7 widget data structures

tasks.name: Create loader file skeleton with cache wrapper
tasks.purpose: Set up the loader file structure with React cache(), imports, and exported function

constraints: Must include 'server-only' import at top
Export loadDashboardData as cached function
Internal dashboardLoader function with Promise.all structure

tasks.input_state: Types file exists with DashboardData interface
tasks.output_state: Loader file exists with cache wrapper, imports, and skeleton dashboardLoader function
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader file exists with loadDashboardData export using cache() wrapper and dashboardLoader skeleton
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q "export const loadDashboardData = cache" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q "'server-only'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts

tasks.name: Add loadRecentActivity mock function
tasks.purpose: Create mock loader returning 5 sample activity items

constraints: Return 5 sample activity items as per feature.md
Include error handling returning null on failure
Use async function signature with SupabaseClient param

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with cache wrapper
tasks.output_state: loadRecentActivity function exists returning typed mock data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists and returns array of 5 activity items matching RecentActivity type
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadRecentActivity' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'

tasks.name: Add loadQuickStats mock function

tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadQuickStats' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'

tasks.name: Add loadTeamStatus, loadResourceUsage, loadActivityFeed mock functions
tasks.purpose: Create final 3 mock loaders for team status, resource usage, and activity feed

dependencies: TeamStatus, ResourceUsage, ActivityFeed types from dashboard.types.ts
constraints: TeamStatus: Online 3, Away 2, Offline 5
ResourceUsage: 65% storage used
ActivityFeed: 10 sample feed items
Include error handling returning null on failure for each
Use async function signatures with SupabaseClient param

tasks.input_state: Loader skeleton exists with cache wrapper
tasks.output_state: Three functions exist returning typed mock data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 3 functions exist and return typed mock data matching specifications
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'async function loadTeamStatus' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'async function loadResourceUsage' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && grep -q 'async function loadActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'

tasks.name: Add directory creation task
tasks.purpose: Ensure _lib/server and _lib/types directories exist before creating files

constraints: Create apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/ if not exists
Create apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/ if not exists

tasks.name: Wire Promise.all orchestration in dashboardLoader
tasks.purpose: Connect all 7 individual loaders using Promise.all for parallel execution

constraints: Use Promise.all to execute all loaders in parallel
Destructure results in order: recentActivity, quickStats, progressOverview, upcomingEvents, teamStatus, resourceUsage, activityFeed
Return object matching DashboardData interface

tasks.output_state: dashboardLoader function orchestrates all loaders with Promise.all and returns DashboardData
tasks.acceptance_criterion: dashboardLoader uses Promise.all with all 7 loaders and returns correctly typed object
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'

tasks.name: Update page.tsx to call loadDashboardData
tasks.purpose: Import and call the loader in the page component to fetch dashboard data

constraints: Call loadDashboardData() in async component body
Pass data to DashboardGrid component
Maintain existing page structure (PageHeader, PageBody)

tasks.input_state: page.tsx exists with minimal structure, loader exists and is complete
tasks.output_state: page.tsx calls loadDashboardData and passes data to grid
tasks.acceptance_criterion: page.tsx imports and calls loadDashboardData, passes result to DashboardGrid
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'loadDashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'

tasks.name: Update dashboard-grid to accept data prop
tasks.purpose: Modify DashboardGrid to accept DashboardData prop and pass to widgets

constraints: Add data prop with DashboardData type
Distribute individual data props to each widget card
Handle null/undefined data gracefully

tasks.input_state: dashboard-grid exists with layout only, page passes data
tasks.output_state: dashboard-grid accepts data prop and distributes to widgets
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardGrid component accepts DashboardData prop and passes individual data to widgets
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'DashboardData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-grid.tsx && pnpm --filter web typecheck 2>&1 | grep -q 'no errors'
